notes: Source is the official Blackmagic Design product technical specifications PDF (7 pages). The 4K Plus G2 (W-CST-13) is the mid-tier model — it lacks the XLR audio inputs, 10GbE RJ45, and 4-pin XLR DC input found on the 4K Pro G2. SDI grade confirmed as 12G (supports 1.5G/3G/6G/12G). USB-C confirmed as 3.1 Gen 1 = 5Gb/s. Power input is a locking 5.5mm DC barrel connector. The 3.5mm Headphone jack is TRRS (supports mic) but is functionally an output; the 3.5mm Mic In is a stereo TRS input that doubles as timecode input.

ports.name: SDI In
ports.note: 1.5G/3G/6G/12G-SDI; carries program return, talkback (ch15/16), camera control, and timecode

ports.name: SDI Out
ports.note: 1.5G/3G/6G/12G-SDI; embeds 2 channels program audio plus 2 talkback channels on 15 and 16

ports.name: 3.5mm Mic In
ports.note: Stereo analog input; can also be used for Timecode input

ports.name: 3.5mm Headphone
ports.note: 3.5mm TRRS mini jack for headphones with mic

ports.name: USB-C Expansion Port 1
ports.note: USB 3.1 Gen 1 (5Gb/s); used for external media recording (Blackmagic RAW), focus/zoom demand, and USB Ethernet (Camera Control REST API/software updates)

ports.name: USB-C Expansion Port 2
ports.note: USB 3.1 Gen 1 (5Gb/s); used for external media recording (Blackmagic RAW), focus/zoom demand
